name: Can in-house lawyers see AEO docs?

mainEntity.name: Can in-house lawyers see AEO docs?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if both parties have in-house counsel, AEO provisions can allow their review.**[6]

Feasible in corporate disputes with mutual counsel.[6]

- **Corporate context**: Standard for peers.[6]
- **Protective order**: Specifies access.[3]
- **Competitor limit**: Core rationale.[2]

Review order language; negotiate if asymmetric. Common in B2B litigation.
